channel.title: NVIDIA on Tech Blog
channel.description: Recent content in NVIDIA on Tech Blog

item.title: Exploring NVIDIA Jetson Orin NX: Flashing and Setup Guide
item.description: On this special Singapore National Day, I am delighted to extend my best wishes as we celebrate Singapore’s 59th birthday. Today, I’m particularly excited to share that I’ve finally received the long-awaited NVIDIA® Jetson Orin™ NX board. I’ll be documenting the flashing process for this powerful device. NVIDIA Jetson Orin is a game-changer, bringing next-generation products to life with the world’s most advanced embedded AI computers, perfect for generative AI, computer vision, and cutting-edge robotics.
